agent_queries: Summarize the known permit process model for a user-owned case from cited public evidence.
List missing user facts before drafting any PP&D form values.
Explain whether existing evidence is stale, ambiguous, conflicting, or sufficient.
Prepare a reversible draft plan that stops before official DevHub actions.
Describe local PDF preview limits without reading private documents.
stale_evidence_behavior: Flag public-source evidence as stale when fixture freshness is expired or unknown.
Ask the user for refreshed public-source confirmation before relying on stale evidence.
Do not convert stale evidence into a permitting guarantee.
missing_information_prompts: Ask for the permit type when no fixture-backed process match exists.
Ask for property address or permit number before case-specific gap analysis.
Ask whether plan review, trade permit purchase, or correction response is intended.
Ask for user confirmation that they are present before any attended handoff.
reversible_draft_boundaries: May map known facts to draft fields in memory or committed test fixtures only.
May prepare save-for-later instructions as a draft plan.
Must stop before certification, upload, payment, scheduling, cancellation, or submission.
Must not claim a workflow step is complete without user-visible completion evidence.
local_pdf_preview_boundaries: May describe expected PDF field mappings from fixture data.
May produce a local preview plan without opening private user files.
Must not persist private file paths, private document text, signatures, or payment details.
Must keep official upload and record attachment out of automated preview behavior.
exact_confirmation_checkpoints: Before opening any attended browser handoff.
Before saving a draft in an authenticated surface.
Before any action that could alter an official record.
Before certification, acknowledgement, payment, scheduling, upload, or submission.
manual_handoff_surfaces: MFA, CAPTCHA, security prompt, or password recovery.
Payment details and final payment execution.
Final official submission, cancellation, scheduling, or upload.
